turns.speaker: Jane Doe
turns.text: We are pleased with our fourth quarter results. Demand for our demonstration products remained resilient despite ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty and tariff headwinds.

turns.speaker: John Smith
turns.text: Revenue grew 6% year over year. Margins were pressured by higher input costs and shipping disruptions in Asia, but we maintained our full-year guidance.

turns.speaker: Analyst
turns.text: Could you comment on how new tariffs might impact your cost structure next year?

turns.speaker: Jane Doe
turns.text: We are actively diversifying our supplier base away from concentrated regions to mitigate exposure to tariffs and geopolitical risk.

turns.speaker: Operator
turns.text: Thank you. We will now begin the question-and-answer session.
